name: ai-shortvideo
description: AI novel generation and short-video production workspace.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ai-shortvideo/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:dom:admin: npm run build -w @ai-shortvideo/shared && npm test -w admin-web && npm run test:dom -w admin-web
scripts.test:rp01c: env -u DATABASE_URL -u DEEPSEEK_API_KEY -u DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL -u DEEPSEEK_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_STRUCTURE_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_REASONER_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_TIMEOUT_MS -u DEEPSEEK_MAX_RETRIES NODE_ENV=production AI_PROVIDER_MODE=mock DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=/dev/null sh -c 'npm run build -w @ai-shortvideo/shared && npm run prisma:generate -w @ai-shortvideo/api && npm run test:rp01c -w @ai-shortvideo/api'
scripts.test:rp02a: env -u DATABASE_URL -u DEEPSEEK_API_KEY -u DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL -u DEEPSEEK_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_STRUCTURE_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_REASONER_MODEL -u DEEPSEEK_TIMEOUT_MS -u DEEPSEEK_MAX_RETRIES NODE_ENV=production AI_PROVIDER_MODE=mock DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=/dev/null sh -c 'npm run build -w @ai-shortvideo/shared && npm run prisma:generate -w @ai-shortvideo/api && cd apps/api && ../../node_modules/.bin/tsx --test test/rp02a/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.e2e:rp01a: npm run build -w @ai-shortvideo/shared && npm run prisma:generate -w @ai-shortvideo/api && node scripts/e2e/run-playwright-backend-e2e.mjs
